name: Archbald Borough Park
description: Come play pickleball at Archbald Borough Park in Jermyn, PA! The court surface is asphalt. You’ll have to create your own lines and bring your own net. Players have access to food, restrooms, and wheelchair accessibility. The courts are free.

name: Billy Barrett Park
description: Come play pickleball at Billy Barrett Park in Scranton, PA! There are 2 outdoor asphalt courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free.

name: Birchwood Tennis & Fitness Club
description: Birchwood Tennis & Fitness Club is a place to play pickleball in South Abington, PA. There are 6 indoor clay and hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Players have access to a pro shop or equipment store, restrooms, water, and lights. A membership is required to play.
hours: Sunday - Saturday: 8:00 AM - Close or last court reservation Location 105 Edella Road S. Abington Township, PA 18411 General: club@birchwoodtennis.com Tennis: tennis@birchwoodtennis.com Pickleball: pickleball@birchwoodtennis.com (570)586-4030 Contact Social

name: Blakely Borough Recreation Complex
description: Blakely Borough Recreation Complex is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Blakely, PA. There are 2 outdoor hard courts. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. Players have access to restrooms, water, and lights. The courts are free.

name: Greater Carbondale YMCA
description: Greater Carbondale YMCA is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Carbondale, PA. There are 2 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A membership is required to play.

name: Greater Scranton YMCA
description: Greater Scranton YMCA is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Dunmore, PA. There are 3 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A membership is required to play.

name: Newton Recreation Center
description: Come play pickleball at Newton Recreation Center in Clarks Summit, PA! There are 4 courts. 3 are outdoors and 1 is indoors. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. A one-time fee is required to play.

name: Waverly Community House
description: Waverly Community House is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Waverly, PA. There are 2 outdoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The courts can be reserved. The courts are private.
